The '''Malarian Alliance''' was a treaty signed by representatives from four [[Planet/Legends|planets]]. Planets that signed the treaty included [[Ansionian]]s and the [[Malarian]]s, in the decades prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

The Alliance joined the worlds together in both commerce and defense. During the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], [[Shu Mai/Legends|Shu Mai]] attempted to force [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] to secede from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]—hoping that the other worlds, bound by their respective treaties, would follow suit, and thus add more planets and [[Star system/Legends|systems]] to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] cause.
